reasoning.typography: Generic system sans-serif (appears to be default stack) with no character. IBM Plex Sans loaded but not visible in this error state. Completely anonymous.
reasoning.hierarchy: Headline dominates adequately, two-column structure has basic clarity, but the visual weight distribution is timid and predictable.
reasoning.distinctiveness: Cloudflare error page template — literally could be any blocked site. Zero brand presence, zero personality, completely interchangeable.
reasoning.color: Monochrome gray + error red. Safe and functional but no palette discipline to evaluate — it's an error state with default warning colors.
reasoning.density: Excessive whitespace, default padding everywhere. Centered content island surrounded by voids. No confident use of space.
reasoning.voice: Pure template structure: 'Why blocked? / What can I do?' — universal error page IA with zero adaptation to Replit's brand or story.

winning_patterns: Clean two-column layout provides basic scanability
Error icon is immediately recognizable for its function
anti_patterns: Cloudflare default template with zero customization — pure stencil
No brand personality whatsoever in error state
Floating content island with excessive uniform whitespace
Generic corporate explanation copy with no voice
Completely interchangeable with any other blocked site
